_comment: Copy this file to brand_config.json and fill in all fields. Remove _comment.
voice: {one-line tone descriptor used by Scribe — e.g. 'high-energy, punchy, no jargon, ends every post with a direct challenge'}

posting_schedule._comment: UTC hours when the agent should fire. Array of integers 0–23.

cta: {Fixed CTA string appended to all content — e.g. 'Follow @artificialeducation'}

signal_sources._comment: Mirror of Field 7 in brief.md. Used by signals/sources.py.
